svg.title: Genome Assembly Pipeline
svg.desc: Haplotype-resolved genome assembly pipeline: HiFi and Hi-C on separate input rows merging into HIFIASM, mito branch on top, QC fan below.
svg.text: PacBio HiFi + Hi-C · Haplotype-resolved, chromosome-scale · gcl_genome_assembly · Nextflow DSL2
Row 1: Mito branch runs in parallel with main pipeline from HiFi reads.
Row 2: HiFi track. Row 3: Hi-C track. Rows 2+3 merge into HIFIASM. All downstream steps process hap1 + hap2 independently.
Dashed blue line: trimmed Hi-C reads also routed to Hi-C mapping step after scaffolding setup.
Dashed green line: assembled mitogenome used to filter nuclear mito-like contigs from HIFIASM output.
Dashed gray arrows: QC outputs aggregated into summary report.
